chapter_goal: Make basic ray tracing inspectable from camera rays through secondary rays.
concept_inventory: linear perspective and orthographic camera rays
camera frame u, v, w and half-pixel image-plane coordinates
parametric ray p(t) and valid t intervals
sphere roots from a quadratic discriminant
triangle hits from barycentric coordinates and a 3x3 solve
shading inputs x, n, l, and v
mirror reflection rays with depth limits

library_routing.why: 3D fan is easier to rotate and inspect in HTML.
2D slices, root plots, and hit maps need durable labeled PNGs.
the chapter algorithm is a data dependency graph.
exact symbolic check shows reflection preserves length for unit normals.
small vector computations make t intervals and normals explicit.
